categories. They are classified as: 
 • Routine - because they are used in small quantities for patients during the usual 
course of most home visits; or 

• Nonroutine - because they are needed to treat a patient's specific illness or injury 
in accordance with the physician or allowed practitioner's plan of care and meet 
further conditions discussed in more detail below.
